ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 'Go To Line' 插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 'Go To Line' 插件

ast.name: log
ast.source: resetting all values to their defaults.
ast.target: 正在将所有值重置为默认值。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: String to seperate multiple curor locations.
ast.target: 用于分隔多个光标位置的字符串。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Line number and character number seperator

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Copy the character location of the cursor when copying.
ast.target: 复制时同时复制光标的字符位置。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Keeps primary cursor at the end of location list when copies. 				If disabled, primary cursor will become the cursor furthest down document.
ast.target: 复制时将主光标保持在位置列表末尾。如果禁用，主光标将成为文档中最下方的光标。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Get the location of the head of a selection when copying line number. 				If disabled the anchor will be copied.
ast.target: 复制行号时获取选区头部的位置。如果禁用，则复制锚点。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Create a newline at the end of the document if given 				line number is past the end. Multiple lines past the end 				will only create one extra line.
ast.target: 如果给定的行号超出文档末尾，则在文档末尾创建新行。超出多行时仅创建一行。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Reset all settings to default values. 				(Don't forget about the hotkeys! Just search 'Go To Line' 				to find the 3 commands.)
ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值。（别忘了快捷键！只需搜索 'Go To Line' 即可找到这 3 个命令。）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Go To Line: Clipboard does not contain valid line information
ast.target: Go To Line: 剪贴板不包含有效的行信息

ast.name: name
ast.source: Go to line with clipboard contents
ast.target: 使用剪贴板内容跳转到行

ast.name: text
ast.source: Keep Primary Cursor on Mulitple Copy
ast.target: 多次复制时保留主光标

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create Newline At End Of Document
